title: Funny Flower Crowns
description: This mod adds Flower Crowns that can be crafted by placing four flowers on a campfire
body:
# Funny Flower Crowns
Funny Flower Crowns is a datapack/mod that adds the ability to create Flower Crowns out of 4 flowers.

You start with this datapack by right clicking a campfire with a flower. That transforms the campfire into a **Flower Workbench** that creates the Flower Crowns when all slots are filled.

All flowers that are listed below can be used, You can also combine different flowers together.

To turn a Flower Workbench back into a campfire you can light it with a flint and steel.

![Flower Workbench](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3a9316e6b53cdc0f5b4039c94b56b96ba0073cb_0.webp)

# Compatible Flowers
Poppy, Dandelion, Cornflower, Blue Orchid, Allium, Azure Bluet, Oxeye Daisy, Lily of the Valley, Wither Rose, Torchflower, Cactus Flower, Closed Eyeblossom, Open Eyeblossom, Pink Petals, Wildflowers, Spore Blossom, Sunflower, Lilac, Rose Bush, Peony, Pitcher Plant, Chorus Flower, Golden Dandelion, Red Tulip, Orange Tulip, White Tulip, Pink Tulip
